note: Chapter manifest. Add a new chapter by dropping a JSON in chapters/ and adding an entry here. Chapters without a 'file' field render dimmed (coming soon).

chapters.title: A Bottle of Dew
chapters.desc: Sudha Murty's tale of a sage who tricks a man into discovering that hard work, not magic, creates true wealth.

chapters.desc: Jean de La Fontaine's classic fable about flattery, vanity, and the cost of pride.
chapters.author: Jean de La Fontaine

chapters.desc: A Tamil Nadu folktale where a clever couple use the village kotwal's name to outwit a thief at night.

chapters.title: The Unlikely Best Friends
chapters.desc: Gajaraj the elephant and Buntee the dog form a beautiful, unexpected friendship.

chapters.desc: A poem on the importance of nurturing real, lasting friendships.
chapters.author: Jill Wolf

chapters.title: The Chair
chapters.desc: A grandfather helps Mario tell real friends from superficial ones.

chapters.desc: Amber chats with the wise old neem tree and learns the many gifts the tree gives our country.
chapters.author: S. I. Farooqi (adapted)

chapters.title: What a Bird Thought
chapters.desc: A small bird's perspective on the wide, surprising world.

chapters.title: Spices that Heal Us
chapters.desc: A grandmother's letter on the everyday Indian spices with natural healing power.

chapters.title: Change of Heart
chapters.desc: Sportsmanship, fair play, and the joy of the game itself, not just the win.

chapters.desc: A poem capturing the joy and thrill of childhood outdoor games.

chapters.title: Yoga — A Way of Life
chapters.desc: Yoga as a path to a healthy, well-balanced and disciplined life.

chapters.title: Hamara Bharat — Incredible India!
chapters.desc: Children from across India share stories of the country's rich craft heritage.

chapters.title: The Kites
chapters.desc: A kite tells its own story of soaring with an unbreakable spirit.
chapters.author: Daphne Lister

chapters.title: Ila Sachani: Embroidering Dreams with her Feet
chapters.desc: How a determined young girl turned challenges into success through traditional embroidery.

chapters.title: National War Memorial
chapters.desc: A poem honouring the spirit behind India's National War Memorial.
